59: Alexandria fought with its neighbour Lindblum during the Storm Surge, and it was the latter who produced the dreadful weapon that wrought disaster.
Alexandria fought with its neighbor Lindblum during the Storm Surge, and it was the latter who produced the dreadful weapon that wrought disaster.

61: Yet for much of the nations' shared history, Lindblum was simply a neighbour, albeit one with rather different customs.
Yet for much of the nations' shared history, Lindblum was simply a neighbor, albeit one with rather different customs.

77: The war broke out not long after she married. As far I could glean from the records, instead of returning to her native land, she remained in Alexandria for the rest of her life.

78: When I discovered my connection to Lindblum, I pledged to learn more of our long-time foe.
